evals.name: hygiene-audit
evals.prompt: Audit our NetworkPolicy hygiene across the fleet.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-netpol preflight` then `cub-netpol findings` (JSON or -o table) and reports findings grouped by severity with counts by analyzer. Read-only.

evals.name: high-severity-only
evals.prompt: Show only the high-severity NetworkPolicy issues.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-netpol findings --severity high` and reports the missing-default-deny-ingress / uncovered-ingress / metadata-egress findings.

evals.name: metadata-egress
evals.prompt: Do any of our policies allow egress to the cloud metadata IP?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-netpol findings --analyzer metadata-egress` and reports any policies admitting 169.254.169.254, then routes the fix to netpol-fix `fix metadata`. Does not mutate.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Fix the namespaces that are missing a default-deny.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a write request and routes to netpol-fix `default-deny` (or netpol-fleet `fleet default-deny`), rather than mutating from this read-only skill.
